scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "bun run --filter server dev" "bun run --filter client dev"
scripts.prod: bun run build && bun run --filter server dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter shared build && bun run --filter server build && bun run --filter client build && bun run --filter cli build
scripts.test: bun test --cwd server && bun test --cwd client && bun test --cwd cli
